2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX
07 - 09 June 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 38
Date 05 June 2026
Time 18:30
Title Free Practice 2 Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow Flags
Description Free Practice 2 Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow Flags
Enclosed MON DOC 38 - Free Practice 2 Deleted Lap Times - Double Yellow.pdf
Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen
Derek Warwick Jean-François Calmes

 
 
 
 
2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 
05 – 07 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 38 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  05 June 2026 
 
        Time  18:30 
  
 
The lap times set by the F1 cars that went through the double waved yellow flag zone will be deleted as detailed in the 
Race Director’s Competition Notes (item 9, document 6): 
 
Session Free Practice 2 
  
Fact The F1 cars passed through a double waved yellow flag marshalling sector. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 12 1 Lando Norris McLaren Mastercard F1 Team 18:09:06 PIT 
2 4 11 Sergio Perez Cadillac Formula 1 Team 18:10:23 PIT 
 
 
Decision Deletion of the lap times shown.   
Note Competitors are reminded that they have the right to appeal certain decisions of the Stewar
